name: View.ViewShorteningAttributes
summary: The ViewShorteningAttributes class sets the shortening attributes for the view. If CutParts is set to true, the other values are applied. If it is false, none of the other values matter.

constructors.name: View.ViewShorteningAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new default view shortening attributes instance.

constructors.name: View.ViewShorteningAttributes(Boolean, Boolean, Double, Double, View.ShorteningCutPartType)
constructors.signature: public ViewShorteningAttributes(bool CutParts, bool CutSkewParts, double MinimumLength, double Offset, View.ShorteningCutPartType CutPartType = View.ShorteningCutPartType.BothDirections)
constructors.summary: Creates a new view shortening attributes instance with the given parameters.

params.name: CutParts
params.doc: A value indicating whether cut parts are enabled.

params.name: CutSkewParts
params.doc: A value indicating whether cut skewed parts are enabled.

params.name: Offset
params.doc: The space between the cut parts.

params.name: CutPartType
params.doc: The optional cut part direction type.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: CutParts
properties.summary: Defines whether cut parts are enabled (true) or disabled (false).

properties.name: CutPartType
properties.summary: Defines cut part type. Not used if CutParts is false.

properties.name: CutSkewParts
properties.summary: Defines whether cut skewed parts are enabled (true) or disabled (false).

properties.name: Offset
properties.summary: The space between the cut parts.
